examples: So far we have been looking at some of the core areas of linguistics, like syntax, phonology, semantics.
Beats-and-Binding Phonology, a theory incorporated in suprasegmental phonology, is closely related to phonotactics.
Phonology is the system of sounds that languages have.
Mr Faith said the language created by Tolkien, Sindarin (the language of the grey elves of Middle Earth), was based on Welsh phonology and grammar.
